description: A pair of round-toed white casual shoes, has cental lace-ups and low-top stylingSynthetic leather upper with overlays, perforations and stitched detail, has branding on both sides of the midfoot and a reinforced heel collar with brandingSoft and padded tongue and inner with branding, perforations and a loop on the tongueCushioned footbed with branding on the heel regionTextured rubber outsole with multiple branding and patterned grooves  White shoe with central lace-ups, overlays, perforations and stitched detailing A padded tongue and inner Tough rubber outsole Thick TPU outsole with circular grooves and suction points
